segments.text:
The Mighty One, God the LORD, speaks and summons the earth
from where the sun rises to where it sets.
From Zion, perfect in beauty, God shines forth.

Our God approaches and will not be silent! Consuming fire precedes Him,
and a tempest rages around Him.
He summons the heavens above, and the earth, that He may judge His people:
Gather to Me My saints, who made a covenant with Me by sacrifice.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And the heavens proclaim His righteousness, for God Himself is Judge.  Selah

Hear, O My people, and I will speak, O Israel, and I will testify against you:
I am God, your God.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I do not rebuke you for your sacrifices, and your burnt offerings are ever before Me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I have no need for a bull from your stallor goats from your pens,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: for every beast of the forest is Mine—the cattle on a thousand hills.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I know every bird in the mountains, and the creatures of the field are Mine.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: If I were hungry, I would not tell you, for the world is Mine, and the fullness thereof.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do I eat the flesh of bulls, or drink the blood of goats?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Sacrifice a thank offering to God, and fulfill your vows to the Most High.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Call upon Me in the day of trouble; I will deliver you, and you will honor Me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: To the wicked, however, God says,

What right have you to recite My statutes
and to bear My covenant on your lips?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For you hate My instruction and cast My words behind you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: When you see a thief, you befriend him, and throw in your lot with adulterers.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You unleash your mouth for evil and unharness your tongue for deceit.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You sit and malign your brother; you slander your own mother’s son.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You have done these things, and I kept silent; you thought I was just like you. But now I rebuke you and accuse you to your face.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
Now consider this, you who forget God, lest I tear you to pieces, 
with no one to rescue you:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
He who sacrifices a thank offering honors Me, and to him who rights his way, 
I will show the salvation of God.
segments.speaker: God
